slides.title: Sharpen your jawline — *no surgery needed*.
slides.sub: Most of a 'weak' jaw is bloat and body fat hiding it. Here's the real fix.

slides.title: Body fat hides the jaw
slides.body: A defined jaw shows up as you *get leaner*. Fat loss reveals it more than any exercise.

slides.title: Cut the salt & alcohol
slides.body: *Sodium and booze* puff your whole face. Drop them and the jawline sharpens in days.

slides.title: Chin up, tongue up
slides.body: Standing tall and *resting your tongue on the roof* of your mouth changes your whole profile.

slides.title: Give your jaw work
slides.body: Harder foods and a little gum build the *masseter muscle*. Real — if minor.

slides.title: Beat the morning puff
slides.body: *Deep sleep and water* drain the overnight fluid that softens your jawline.

slides.title: Lean, debloated, *defined*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks the sleep, food & water that actually reveal your jaw — in one score.

caption:
A "weak" jaw is usually bloat and body fat hiding a good one. 🫨

Lean out, cut the salt & booze, fix your posture, sleep deep. The jaw was there the whole time. Save this. 🔖

Vibe tracks the sleep, food & water that actually reveal your jawline → link in bio.
youtube_title: Sharpen Your Jawline — No Surgery Needed

bg_prompts.cover: Black-and-white cinematic editorial beauty portrait. Dramatic low-key Rembrandt lighting, deep shadows, dark charcoal background. Glowing dewy skin with fine realistic texture, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens look. Single subject, calm confident mood. No text, no logos, no props. Vertical composition with the subject toward the upper half so the lower third falls into darkness. A man with a sharp, strong, well-defined jawline and chiseled chin, three-quarter profile, jaw catching a rim of light.
